elements.original_description: A person sitting at a desk with their head in their hands, surrounded by scattered books and papers, avoiding learning, minimalist illustration style
elements.image_prompt: A person sitting at a desk with their head in their hands, surrounded by scattered books and papers, avoiding learning. Professional 2D minimalist illustration, clean flat vector art, pure white background, high contrast, no shading or gradients, muted and slightly melancholic color palette to reflect an overwhelming mood.
